title: PotatoBlock
description: Skyblock, but it's a Potato. Only for the minecraft version 24w14potato.
body:
# PotatoBlock

Skyblock, but it's a Potato. Only for the minecraft version 24w14potato.

This is a fork of the [Skyblock Infinite](https://modrinth.com/datapack/skyblock-infinite), but made for the Potato update. 

All structures genterate like normal, include the potato structures.


## How to Install
1. Start creating a new world and click the **More** tab at the top left
2. Click the **"Data Packs"** button
3. Click the **"Open Pack Folder"** button
4. Drag and drop the datapack into the folder
5. Click on the Skyblock Infinite datapack in the **"Available"** list
6. Finish creating your world!


## Join the Community

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/cxkP79kPMz) to get help with your Skyblock questions, or just come and hang out with other Skyblockers!
